---
title: "Experience"
---

## [Posit, PBC](https://posit.co) (formerly RStudio, Inc)

#### Software Engineer Intern

June 2025 – Aug 2025

##  [Oregon State University](https://oregonstate.edu)

#### Doctoral Researcher 

Sep 2021 - Present 

#### Statistics / ML Consultant 

Jan 2021 - Mar 2025

• Led and collaborated with faulty members, junior statisticians, and client researchers to deliver data-driven consulting services to support diverse research initiatives. <br> 
• Produced comprehensive reports, detailing simple statistical tests, advanced data modeling, machine learning, experimental design, and software usage (R, Python). 

#### Graduate Teaching Assistant 

Mar 2020 - Present 

• Assist with graduate and undergraduate courses such as machine learning III, computational statistics, missing data and causal inference, spatial statistics, stochastic models, data analysis methods I (hypothesis testing, multiple testing), II (regression analysis, model selection), III (dimension reduction techniques, generalized regression models), mathematical statistics I, II, statistical methods, statistics for engineers, and elementary statistics I. <br> 
• Teach R programming and discuss statistical problems during labs or recitations, hold office hours, and grade exams and assignments.

#### Graduate Project Assistant

Jun 2024 - Aug 2024

• Assisted with the design and development of the course curriculum for spatial statistics. <br> 
• Applied a variety of spatial models, including kriging / Gaussian process regression, C / SAR (conditional / simultaneous autoregressive), and Poisson process / CSR models for simulation and applications such as housing price prediction, disease risk mapping, and forest and forest fire modeling.
